title: Founders Associate

must_haves.req: Work directly with founders across ops, product, and growth
must_haves.note: Ryan was first employee/Founder's Associate at Minima, working directly with founders across exactly these areas.
Fundraising/budget exposure ($300k budget, investor updates) but no formal accounting/bookkeeping.

must_haves.req: Extreme intensity — weekends, late nights, EA-style tasks (flights, visas)
must_haves.note: Startup-intensity proven; willingness to do EA-grade admin is a fit/preference question.
Ryan's 2:1 Leeds Business degree is solid but not the elite-MBA/top-tier signal the team appears to index on.

one_line_verdict: Ryan's actual Founder's-Associate-at-an-early-startup background maps closely, but elite-pedigree signalling and the EA-heavy/extreme-intensity framing pull it to a borderline stretch.
fetch_note: Role confirmed open via founders' LinkedIn hiring posts and WebSearch (Balderton-backed AI music DAW, ~$7M raised, London). No standalone ATS URL found — usemozart.com is parked/for-sale; usemozart.com/careers 307-redirects to a GoDaddy parking page. Best direct link is the Mozart AI company LinkedIn jobs page. Apply via founders directly.
